description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with the body and limbs unnaturally elongated and twisted, creating a surreal, stretched appearance. The head and upper torso are discernible, with the arms extended forward as if reaching or pulling, while the legs are bent and appear to be in motion. The clothing consists of a long-sleeved top and pants, with the fabric also stretched and warped along with the body. The figure's posture suggests dynamic movement, but the extreme elongation gives it an abstract, almost liquid-like quality. The surface appears smooth and matte, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall form is visually striking, resembling a person caught in a moment of rapid motion or transformation.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian figure with stretched limbs and body, wearing a long-sleeved top and pants in a dynamic, reaching posture. The form is highly distorted, giving an abstract, fluid impression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and arms extended upward, with the body and legs dramatically stretched and twisted.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme elongation of the torso and arms, with the head and hands reaching far forward and the legs bent in motion.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the stretched back and legs, with the arms and upper body forming a wide V-shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the elongated limbs and torso from a different angle, showing the twisting of the body and the dynamic posture.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved top and pants in a casual style
attribute_posture: dynamically stretched, reaching forward with bent legs
